name: AA Pawn Shop
description_short: AA Pawn Shop in Los Angeles offers collateral-based loans and jewelry pawning services with extended operating hours. Located on South Vermont Ave, it has been serving the community for years.
description_long:
AA Pawn Shop is a pawn operation located at 8604 S Vermont Ave in Los Angeles, CA 90044. The business has been established long enough to have developed a customer base, with at least some repeat clients citing years of patronage. The shop operates extended hours seven days a week, opening as early as 9:00 AM and staying open until 11:00 PM most days, suggesting a focus on convenience and accessibility for customers in the Los Angeles area.

The primary service offered is pawn lending, where customers can exchange personal items—particularly jewelry—for cash loans. According to available reviews, the shop provides appraisals and loans on jewelry items, with customers able to either reclaim their items or forfeit them if they cannot repay the loan. The business operates on a collateral-based model typical of pawn shops, where the value of the item determines the loan amount offered.

The shop distinguishes itself primarily through its extended hours of operation (9 AM–11 PM most days) and stated willingness to work with repeat customers. One customer review specifically mentions receiving fair prices on jewelry pawns and successfully recovering items multiple times, suggesting a retention strategy focused on repeat business and reasonable valuations.

However, the business faces significant reputation challenges based on available customer feedback. With a 2.0 star rating across 15 reviews, the shop has 11 one-star reviews and only 4 five-star reviews. Customer complaints include allegations of lost items without compensation, rude staff behavior, dismissive treatment based on appearance and ethnicity, and aggressive collection practices. Multiple reviews describe staff as belittling customers during loan transactions. The pattern of negative feedback suggests systemic customer service issues that overshadow any operational conveniences offered.
pros: Extended operating hours (9 AM–11 PM most days, 7 days per week) for customer convenience
Long-standing presence in Los Angeles community with established customer base
Offers jewelry appraisals and cash loans on collateral items
Some customers report fair pricing on jewelry pawns
Repeat customers have successfully recovered pawned items multiple times
Accessible location on South Vermont Ave in Los Angeles
Provides loans without credit checks, serving unbanked/underbanked populations
cons: 2.0 star rating with 73% one-star reviews indicating widespread customer dissatisfaction
Multiple customer allegations of lost or mishandled items with no compensation offered
Documented complaints of staff rudeness, discriminatory treatment based on appearance and race, and belittling customer interactions
Aggressive collection practices reported, including claiming merchandise sold one day past due date
No mention of transparent fee structures, APR disclosures, or clear loan term policies on website
best_for: Customers with jewelry or valuable items needing quick cash who prioritize extended operating hours
Repeat customers already familiar with the shop's operations and staff
Individuals without access to traditional lending who need collateral-based loans
diagnosis: AA Pawn Shop is best suited for customers who need quick cash on jewelry or valuables and require extended operating hours, but the 2.0 star rating and documented complaints about lost merchandise, staff discrimination, and aggressive collection practices present significant risk. Prospective customers should be aware of the high proportion of negative reviews and lack of transparency around loan terms and fee structures before engaging with this business.
